rulings.Case Title: EDWARD J CONNER VS. COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTS COUSINS/MYERS II, LLC, MYERS DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, COUSINS PROPERTIES INCORPORATED and JACK MYERS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Continued to June 6, 2014 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT FRIEDMAN VS. MICHAEL J. SPOHN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp Sec 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF SCOTT FRIEDMAN's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To CCP Sec 664.6 GRANTED. Defendants breached the terms of the stipulation. The judgment shall enter immediately and shall include the 10% interest on $52,500 (Mach 19, 2014 to April 30, 2014) and increased rental payment for the same period of time. Judgment shall be stayed for two weeks to provide Defendants an opportunity to comply with the terms of the settlement agreement. Maintenance issues are outside the scope of the settlement agreement and are not properly before the Court on this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Overruled, 10 days to answer. Demurer to cause of action for declaratory relief is not supported by any authorities in the Points and Authorities. Cause of action for indemnity are sufficiently alleged and are not barred by the statue of limitations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Cross-Complaint By Eugene Hong Filed By Cross-Defendant Chicago Title Co.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 3. Demurrer To Cross-Complaint By Eugene Hong Filed By Cross-Defendant Chicago Title Co. Overruled, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for negligence and equitable indemnity are sufficiently alleged and are not bared by the statute of limitations. See Seeley v. Seymour (1987) 190 Cal.App.3d 844; Paragon v. Hansen (2009) 178 CAL.App.4th 177; Norgart v. Upjohn (1999) 21 Cal.4th 383. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER ELMORE VS. ANNLIA PAGANINI HILL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT ANNLIA HILL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether the Premises have been the principal place of residence for Ms. Hill and her husband since October 2012. (Fact #17). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to June 17, 2014 on Court's own Motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to June 17, 2014 on Court's own Motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHANIE JACKSON et al VS. KISHORE KAGOLANU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 6. CROSS DEFENDANT CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. On an indemnity claim cross-complainant is entitled to recover attorney's fees for the underlying complaint by a third-party subject to limitations set forth in CCP 1021.6. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL FRYE et al VS. MARIA CARMEN C. JIMENEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT MARIA JIMENEZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, in the alternative Motion to Strike OVERRULED/DENIED. Complaint sufficiently and properly alleges a ripe and actual controversy at least regarding obligations of the defendant to pay rent. This Court is proper forum for this action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENE TELEGIN VS. MATTHEW NAIFY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 30, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANTS MATTHEW NAIFY, GIORGIO TEJEDA and RICARDO CARRANZA Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer DENIED without prejudice to be raised before the trial judge.= (501/REQ)
